content.en:
Twelfth dimension.

Jin Yuanhai.

Ye Tian came here through the dimensional channel of the Baiye Chamber of Commerce, although he was also able to penetrate the twelfth dimension, it was not easy to find Jin Yuanhai.

Jinyuanhai is an important industry of the Baiye Chamber of Commerce, which can be rich in a special resource, which requires the special environment of Jinyuanhai~.

However, there are a lot of Sixth Realm multi-dimensional beings here, and there are often a large number of Sixth Realm-Multidimensional Beings to cause trouble.

Therefore, the Hundred Leaf Chamber of Commerce needs a lot of Sixth Realms to deal with these-troubles.

After Ye Tian entered the Golden Source Sea, he received a brand, which could detect how many Sixth Realm multidimensional beings he had killed.

But if you get out of here, it will be undetectable, which means that you must kill the sixth realm multi-dimensional life in Jinyuanhai before you can count the number of kills.

Soon.

Ye Tian found a Sixth Realm multi-dimensional life and easily killed it.

In the days that followed, he encountered one after another Sixth Realm multidimensional lifeforms, some of which were so powerful that even if he wanted to, it would take a little effort.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered an extremely terrifying Sixth Realm multi-dimensional life, he was not an opponent, and he tried his best to escape with his life.

"It's really dangerous here, with my strength, I was almost killed, and the slightly weaker Sixth Realm will definitely die when I come here!"

But.

After a period of time, Ye Tian still managed to kill a hundred Sixth Realm multi-dimensional lifeforms, and obtained the quota to buy the Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid, and he could only buy ten bottles at most.

If you want to buy more Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid, you have to complete the task again.

Soon.

Ye Tian bought ten bottles of Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid.

After going back.

Ye Tian tried to refine the Heavenly Pulp Gold Liquid to see the effect of the Heavenly Pulp Gold Liquid.

Rumble!!!!

The energy of the Heavenly Marrow Golden Liquid continued to pour into Ye Tian's body, helping him to improve his cultivation, and the effect of improving his cultivation was too good, it was easier to increase his cultivation by a hundred or even a thousand times than other resources.

"It deserves to be the Heavenly Essence Golden Liquid with a huge reputation!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

If he had enough Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid, it would not be difficult for him to raise his cultivation to the peak of the Sixth Realm.

But if you want to buy enough Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid, you not only have to complete a lot of tasks, but you also have to have enough financial resources.

"Take your time, use up these ten bottles of Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid first, and improve your cultivation!"

Ye Tian began to cultivate.

Time passed, and a long time passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's ten bottles of Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid were exhausted, and his cultivation had also been promoted to the peak realm of the early stage of the Sixth Realm, if there were two or three more bottles of Heavenly Marrow Golden Liquid, he would definitely be able to raise his cultivation to the middle realm of the Sixth Realm, and this kind of improvement efficiency was already extremely terrifying.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian went to the Baiye Chamber of Commerce again, and still took over the task of Jin Yuanhai.

This time, he was a little unlucky, one copy body was killed, fortunately he was ready, and the other copy body picked up the sign and continued to look for the sixth realm multidimensional life, which was enough to kill a hundred sixth realm multidimensional lifeforms.

Then, he traded ten bottles of Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid again.

Soon after.

Ye Tian's cultivation finally completed a breakthrough and reached the cultivation of the middle stage of the sixth realm.

However, if you want to upgrade your cultivation to the late stage of the Sixth Realm, you need at least fifty bottles of Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid.

Ye Tian originally wanted to take the Jin Yuanhai mission all the time, but after he completed another mission, he found that the Jin Yuanhai mission was gone.

After some inquiry, I learned that a sixth realm invincible super-dimensional realm directly killed all the sixth-realm multi-dimensional beings in the Jinyuan Sea.

So, there is no need for this task in a short period of time.

"That Invincible Sixth Realm is too tricky, at least wait for me to complete a few more tasks!" Ye Tian said speechlessly.

If he had known, he should not have cultivated, he should have kept completing the task first, and obtained enough Heavenly Marrow Golden Liquid at one time before going into retreat and penance.

But he didn't expect this task to suddenly disappear.

Ye Tian picked and chosen, and finally chose this task.

【Forging Top Dimensional Tongbao】

Ye Tian didn't know how to forge a dimensional channel, let alone a top-level dimensional Tongbao, but the Baiye Chamber of Commerce had mastered the assembly line work of refining a top-level dimensional Tongbao.

They will mobilize 100,000 Sixth Realms to refine the top-level dimensional pupil treasure through a formation, and each Sixth Realm is responsible for different types of work, the work is simple, and any Sixth Realm can be competent.

However, very few Sixth Realms were willing, and the Sixth Realm of the Baiye Chamber of Commerce itself was unwilling to do this, because this assembly line work was dangerous and would also erode the physical body.

0 for flowers0

It is said that this formation is very evil, and it uses a special energy, but this energy is extremely harmful to the sixth realm body.

Of course, if you only go once, the problem of physical damage is not serious, but if you go many times, the foundation will be destroyed, and you won't want to break through to the seventh realm in the future.

Only the sixth realm of the seventh realm that is hopeless among some forces, for the sake of the forces behind them or future generations, will come to forge the top-level dimensional treasure of this assembly line.

Ye Tian didn't want to go before, it wasn't that he was worried about his body, he was worried about copying his body, he was worried that he would go frequently, but he would have no physical problems in the future, and he would be targeted by the Baiye Chamber of Commerce.

But if you think about it carefully, what kind of power is the Baiye Chamber of Commerce, where will it investigate him, and it won't care about him.

So, he took on the task.

However, to take this task, you still have to gather 100,000 Sixth Realms before you can start forging, not if you want to forge it immediately, you can forge it immediately.

After about a few days, Ye Tian received a notice that he could go to forging.

During this period, he also obtained the method of forging, and he has already understood it thoroughly, and there will be no problems.

Of course.

Before forging, they must make an oath in these Sixth Realms, and they must not deliberately fail in refining, must not destroy the formation, and must not ......

In short, it is necessary to honestly forge the top-level dimensional Tongbao.

......

In a vast forged void.

One hundred thousand Sixth Realms gathered here, and this was the first time Ye Tian had seen so many Sixth Realms gathered together.

On the other side of the 5,000th Territory, there was not even a Sixth Realm in the past, but the Sixth Realm had to be reduced to a part-time job here.

Soon.

One hundred thousand Sixth Realms sit in their own position.

Rumble!!!!

The formation enveloped all the 100,000 Sixth Realms, and each Sixth Realm began to take charge of a part of the formation, and began to forge a part of the patterns that the top-level dimensional channel was responsible for.

Bang!!!!

A mysterious energy connected the 100,000 Sixth Realms, and each other seemed to be one with each other, and began to forge them.

Time passed, and the strength of the people continued to be consumed, but the forging process went very smoothly.

After a long time.

A top-level dimensional treasure of the sword type has been refined into eight.
